title: ibelick/ui-skills
friendlyTitle: ui-skills gives AI coding tools better design instructions
summary: ui-skills is a fast-rising collection of reusable design-engineering skills for AI coding tools, with guidance covering interface baselines, motion and UI improvement. The TypeScript project has about 4,600 stars and was the strongest AI-related repository in today’s collected GitHub Trending results.
friendlySummary: ui-skills is a popular open-source set of design guides for AI coding tools. It covers areas such as basic interface quality, motion and improving an existing UI.
whyItMatters: Add its focused skills to a compatible coding-agent workflow when you want more consistent interface decisions than a broad “make it look good” prompt. Review the generated result for accessibility and project-specific design rules rather than treating the skill as a substitute for testing.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it to give a coding agent clearer design rules. You should still check accessibility and test the final interface with people.
